chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const: Petition No.S-159 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Non-prosecution 14.07.2025 Mr. Abdul Qayyum Arain, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- At the very outset, the learned counsel for the petitioner appeared and submitted that he does not press the petition. Accordingly, the petition is treated as not pressed/withdrawn. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
